description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for orchestration-related API endpoints in a Node.js backend server. It includes endpoints for starting orchestrations, running full workflows, retrieving orchestration status, linking uploads, extracting and normalizing text, generating persona drafts, and finalizing personas. The file interacts with an orchestration service and utility error functions, and it specifies several public API routes related to orchestration workflows.

methods.name: router.post('/start')
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session, initiating a build/workflow process.

methods.name: router.post('/run-all')
methods.description: Runs a complete orchestration workflow in a single call, including build, upload linking, extraction, normalization, and draft generation.

methods.name: router.get('/builds/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves the current orchestration record for a specific build ID.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/link-upload')
methods.description: Links an uploaded file or document to an existing build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/extract-normalize')
methods.description: Derives normalized text for a build from linked documents.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/generate-draft')
methods.description: Generates a persona draft based on normalized text or provided input.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/finalize')
methods.description: Finalizes the persona, saving the final blob and optionally creating a new version.
